name: climate-plan-review
description: Structure climate plan + emissions modelling audit (Auckland Climate Plan seed) — not climate advice

steps.text: Use skill climate-modeling + knowledge/climate/*.md. Prefer PDF extract if user ran --pdf. Do not invent MtCO2e.

steps.goal: Using skill climate-modeling and knowledge/climate/auckland-climate-plan.md plus climate-modeling.md, produce: (1) verdict first on modelling hygiene (2) plan identity and goals (3) modelling map (tool, baseline, BAU, pathway, residual, uncertainty) (4) re-derive key table arithmetic where possible (5) sector/priority structure (6) crosswalk to urban/transport/freight (7) verification next steps (8) non-claims. Use only claims supported by knowledge or user extract.
criteria: Verdict on illustrative vs predictive framing
CURB/tool and 2016 baseline stated as plan claims
BAU vs pathway numbers table or explicit missing
Re-derive or flag arithmetic on 50%/94% claims
